claim_boundary: Frozen-model panel smoke only. This verifies three frozen public models can be evaluated on shared synthetic and DIAS surfaces, but it does not estimate construct validity or clinical accuracy.

dias_sample.prompt_source: DIAS sequence-level mask bbox; smoke-test oracle prompt, not a deployable prompt source

models.checkpoint_note: Original checkpoint loads directly on this host.
models.source: Meta Segment Anything ViT-B checkpoint used in S1/S3.

models.checkpoint_note: CPU-mapped copy of official CUDA-serialized checkpoint; original SHA256 34b34b78c1d18cb8c6bf84cf9c00e135d6d6c965699f3c0e31ef1bc9dcb5be74.
models.source: MedSAM repository README checkpoint folder; official file was CPU-mapped locally for non-CUDA loading.

models.checkpoint_note: Official checkpoint loaded on MPS in one-frame S2c candidate smoke.
models.source: Meta Segment Anything official README ViT-L checkpoint URL.

ordering_comparison.claim_boundary: Three-model ordering rows are a smoke diagnostic only and cannot support construct-validity claims or confidence intervals.

synthetic_surface.prompt_source: TopCoW projected GT bbox; smoke-test oracle prompt, not a deployable prompt source
